name: MATTEL INC /DE/
summary: PART I . Throughout this report "Mattel" refers to Mattel, Inc. and/or one or more of its subsidiaries. Mattel is a leading global play and family entertainment company and owner of one of the most iconic brand portfolios in the world. Mattel's mission is to create innovative products and experiences that inspire fans, entertain audiences, and develop children through play, and its purpose is to empower generations to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential.
